name: Traditional Bread Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 4 cups bread cubes, 1 cup chopped celery, 1/3 cup chopped onion, 2 tablespoons freshly chopped parsley leaves, 1 minced garlic clove, 1/2 cup hot water, 1/4 teaspoon ground black pepper, 1/4 teaspoon ground sage, 1/4 teaspoon dried marjoram, 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme, and 1/8 teaspoon dried basil in a large bowl.
2. Toss the ingredients together with a wooden spoon until evenly distributed.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly-oiled casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes.
Note: This dressing may also be used as stuffing for Cornish hens, chicken, and turkey. For a more moist dressing, use 3/4 cup warm water instead of hot water.
